title: Verify trailer autoplay for unstarted content in top content
description: Test that trailer autoplays for content not yet started in the top content section
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner with >90% consumption
User has not started recommended content

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner with consumption >90%

expected_result: Trailer autoplays for the top recommended content, trial-corner-topcontent-played event fires with autoplay attribute
